goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'gonville hotel'.
Make sure you get 'price range', 'area', and 'address'.
You are also looking for a 'particular attraction'. Its name is called 'the man on the moon'.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.
